title: Characteristics of Materials, Appliances, Systems and Equipment
full_text:
1.2.2.1 Characteristics of Materials, Appliances, Systems and Equipment
Characteristics of Materials, Appliances, Systems and Equipment
1) All materials, appliances, systems and equipment installed to meet the
requirements of this Code shall possess the necessary characteristics to perform their
intended functions when installed in a building.

sentences.text: All materials, appliances, systems and equipment installed to meet the requirements of this Code shall possess the necessary characteristics to perform their intended functions when installed in a building.
